# History

## 2.0.7 / 2020-02-24

  * Fix array methods on `all()` result in Node.js 6+
  * Fix error when `trust` argument is empty array
  * deps: ipaddr.js@1.9.1
    - Fix IPv6-mapped IPv4 validation edge cases
  * deps: forwarded@0.2.0
    - Use stricter header parsing
    - Fix header parsing to not accept invalid IP addresses
    - Fix header parsing to reject headers without IP addresses
  * perf: improve IPv4 regex validation
  * perf: improve IPv6 regex validation

## 2.0.6 / 2019-04-16

  * deps: ipaddr.js@1.9.0
    - Add IPv6 Unique Local Address support
    - Add IPv6 Zone ID support
  * perf: reduce overhead for IPv4 validation

## 2.0.5 / 2019-02-22

  * deps: ipaddr.js@1.8.1
    - Fix IPv6 CIDR validation edge cases

## 2.0.4 / 2018-07-26

  * deps: ipaddr.js@1.8.0
    - Add `ipaddr.IPv6.isIPv4MappedAddress()` method
    - Add `ipaddr.IPv6.toString()` method
    - Improve error messages

## 2.0.3 / 2018-01-29

  * deps: ipaddr.js@1.6.0
    - Add `ipaddr.createReversedNibbleString()`
    - Add `ipaddr.parse(input, 4|6)`
    - Add `ipaddr.parseCIDR(input, 4|6)`
    - Add `ipaddr.subnetMatch(address, rangeList, defaultName)`
    - Add `ipaddr.IPv4.isValidFourPartDecimal()`
    - Add `ipaddr.IPv6.isValid()`
    - Deprecate `ipaddr.IPv4.fromIPv6Group()`
    - Deprecate `ipaddr.IPv4.parse()`
    - Deprecate `ipaddr.IPv4.parseCIDR()`
    - Deprecate `ipaddr.IPv6.fromIPv4()`
    - Deprecate `ipaddr.IPv6.parse()`
    - Deprecate `ipaddr.IPv6.parseCIDR()`
    - Improve error messages

## 2.0.2 / 2017-09-24

  * deps: forwarded@~0.1.2
    - perf: improve header parsing
    - perf: reduce overhead when no `X-Forwarded-For` header
  * deps: ipaddr.js@1.5.2
    - Fix edge cases with `isValid`

## 2.0.1 / 2017-09-10

  * deps: ipaddr.js@1.5.1
    - Fix regression in `isValid` with mixed case

## 2.0.0 / 2017-08-08

  * Drop support for Node.js below 0.10
  * Introduce `all` option to `trust` argument
  * deps: ipaddr.js@1.4.0
    - Add `ipaddr.format(addr, suffix)`
    - Add `ipaddr.isValid(addr)`
    - Detect reserved IPv6 space

## 1.1.5 / 2017-07-25

  * Fix array argument being altered
  * deps: ipaddr.js@1.4.0

## 1.1.4 / 2017-03-24

  * deps: ipaddr.js@1.3.0

## 1.1.3 / 2017-01-14

  * deps: ipaddr.js@1.2.0

## 1.1.2 / 2016-05-29

  * deps: ipaddr.js@1.1.1
    - Fix IPv6-mapped IPv4 validation edge cases

## 1.1.1 / 2016-05-03

  * Fix regression matching mixed versions against multiple subnets
  * deps: ipaddr.js@1.1.0

## 1.1.0 / 2016-05-01

  * Add `trust` argument to determine proxy trust on per-request basis
  * Fix trimming of IPv6 addresses with zone identifier
  * deps: ipaddr.js@1.0.5
    - Fix interface of `isEqual`

## 1.0.10 / 2015-12-09

  * deps: ipaddr.js@1.0.4
    - Fix accepting some invalid IPv6 addresses
    - Reject CIDRs with negative or overlong masks
  * perf: enable strict mode

## 1.0.9 / 2015-10-02

  * Fix case where 'trust proxy' app setting is a hostname

## 1.0.8 / 2015-09-21

  * Fix case where 'trust proxy' app setting is not a number

## 1.0.7 / 2015-09-15

  * Fix case where 'trust proxy' app setting is not a number

## 1.0.6 / 2015-09-09

  * Fix case where 'trust proxy' app setting is not a number
  * deps: ipaddr.js@1.0.3

## 1.0.5 / 2015-08-22

  * Fix `isPrivate` for IPv4 addresses in 10.0.0.0/8
  * deps: ipaddr.js@1.0.2

## 1.0.4 / 2015-07-31

  * deps: ipaddr.js@1.0.1
    - Fix global variable leak

## 1.0.3 / 2015-05-10

  * deps: ipaddr.js@0.1.9
    - Fix OOB error when parsing IPv4 addresses

## 1.0.2 / 2015-04-07

  * Fix a global leak when multiple subnets are trusted
  * Support Node.js 0.6
  * deps: ipaddr.js@0.1.8
    - Fix detection of private IPv4 networks in IPv6-mapped addresses

## 1.0.1 / 2015-03-16

  * deps: ipaddr.js@0.1.6

## 1.0.0 / 2015-02-01

  * Initial stable release
  * Fix accepting various invalid netmasks
    - IPv4 netmasks must be contingous
    - IPv6 addresses cannot be used as a netmask
  * deps: ipaddr.js@0.1.5
    - Fix edge cases with IPv6 parsing
    - Provide `ipaddr.IPv6.isIPv4MappedAddress()`

## 0.0.1 / 2014-05-04

  * Initial release
  * Compatible with Express.js 3.x and 4.x
